description_long: This is a sturdy, square wooden stool with a simple, utilitarian design, featuring four thick legs and a flat, broad seat. The wood grain is clearly visible across all surfaces, with some areas showing subtle discoloration or weathering, suggesting outdoor or heavy use. The legs are reinforced with horizontal support bars on all sides, adding to the stool's stability and strength. There are no visible decorative elements, backrest, or cushioning, emphasizing its functional, rustic character. The finish is matte and slightly rough, with a natural wood color interspersed with patches of darker and lighter tones. This stool would be well-suited for urban environments such as parks, bus stops, or public gathering areas.
description: A robust, square wooden stool with visible wood grain, reinforced legs, and a weathered, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat seat, two thick legs, and a horizontal support bar beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features as the front, highlighting the wood grain and support bar.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, with visible support bar and leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same leg and support bar arrangement, with wood grain details.
